title: Alexey Kulemzin

infobox.value: (1974-09-13) 13 September 1974 (age 51)  [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), [Ukrainian SSR](/wiki/Ukrainian_Soviet_Socialist_Republic "Ukrainian Soviet Socialist Republic"), [Soviet Union](/wiki/Soviet_Union "Soviet Union")

([Russian](/wiki/Russian_language "Russian language"): Алексей Валерьевич Кулемзин, [Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Олексій Валерійович Кулемзін, [romanized](/wiki/Romanization_of_Ukrainian "Romanization of Ukrainian"): *Oleksii Valeriiovych Kulemzin*; born 13 June 1974) is a Russo-Ukrainian politician and [collaborator](/wiki/Collaboration_with_Russia_during_the_Russian_invasion_of_Ukraine "Collaboration with Russia during the Russian invasion of Ukraine") who serves as [Mayor of Donetsk](/wiki/Mayor_of_Donetsk "Mayor of Donetsk") since 2016.

["Перестановки в "ДНР": Захарченко представил нового "мэра" Донецка"](https://tsn.ua/ru/ato/perestanovki-v-dnr-zaharchenko-predstavil-novogo-mera-donecka-732169.html). *ТСН.ua* (in Russian). 2016-10-20. Retrieved 2022-05-14.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Ukrainian politician, de facto mayor of Donetsk

In this name that follows [East Slavic naming customs](/wiki/East_Slavic_naming_customs "East Slavic naming customs"), the [patronymic](/wiki/Patronymic "Patronymic") is  *Valeryevich* and the [family name](/wiki/Surname "Surname") is  *Kulemzin*.

**Alexey Valeryevich Kulemzin** ([Russian](/wiki/Russian_language "Russian language"): Алексей Валерьевич Кулемзин, [Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Олексій Валерійович Кулемзін, [romanized](/wiki/Romanization_of_Ukrainian "Romanization of Ukrainian"): *Oleksii Valeriiovych Kulemzin*; born 13 June 1974) is a Russo-Ukrainian politician and [collaborator](/wiki/Collaboration_with_Russia_during_the_Russian_invasion_of_Ukraine "Collaboration with Russia during the Russian invasion of Ukraine") who serves as [Mayor of Donetsk](/wiki/Mayor_of_Donetsk "Mayor of Donetsk") since 2016.

## Biography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alexey_Kulemzin&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Biography")]

Between 2007 and 2010, he was Head of the Department for Foreign Economic Relations and European Integration of the [Donetsk Regional State Administration](/wiki/Donetsk_Oblast "Donetsk Oblast"). Later, between 2011 and 2013, he was the Deputy Head of the Department for Regional Development, Attraction of Investment and Foreign Economic Relations.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

On 17 October 2016, the [Head of the unrecognized Donetsk People's Republic](/wiki/Head_of_the_Donetsk_People%27s_Republic "Head of the Donetsk People's Republic") [Alexander Zakharchenko](/wiki/Alexander_Zakharchenko "Alexander Zakharchenko") appointed Kulemzin as acting Mayor of Donetsk.[[2]](#cite_note-2)
